title: RHCSA 10 Lab 07: Flatpak Package
description: Install and remove Flatpak applications from a configured remote

tasks: Ensure the system Flatpak remote rhcsa10 exists and points to file:///opt/rhcsa/flatpak/repo.
Install Flatpak application org.rhcsa.Tools from rhcsa10 for the system installation.
hints: Flatpak installs can be scoped with --system.
Use flatpak list --app to verify installed applications.
solution_outline: Make the requested configuration persistent and verify it before finishing.
task_titles: Ensure the system Flatpak remote rhcsa10 exists and points to file:///op
Install Flatpak application org.rhcsa.Tools from rhcsa10 for the system
